prompt: Create an invoice for the customer Nordic Education Foundation (org no. 955123456, email: admin@nordedu.org) for "Teacher Training Program" at 85000 NOK. This is an educational service exempt from VAT (0% VAT). Send the invoice by email.
notes: Invoice with 0% VAT in English. Educational service is VAT-exempt. Agent must find the correct 0% VAT type from GET /ledger/vatType instead of defaulting to 25%.
